_doc: Prototype-mode zombie. Extends legacy enemy.json with §4 numbers: HP 30, 5 DMG, 1 atk-sec, 8-tile aggro. Speed 3 (was 6 in legacy) — clearly slower than the player (speed 8) so the player can outrun a single zombie but is challenged by multiple. Drops are inherited (single 'meat' which the FEATURE_FLAGS.USE_ESSENCE_DROPS swap turns into essence). The spawn block is also inherited but PrototypeStateMachine overrides it per state.
